nasb.text: and a bulb was under the first pair of branches coming out of it, and a bulb under the second pair of branches coming out of it, and a bulb under the third pair of branches coming out of it, for the six branches coming out of the lampstand.

esv.text: and a calyx of one piece with it under each pair of the six branches going out of it.

cnv.text: 從燈臺伸出的每兩個枝子以下都有一個球，燈臺的六個枝子都是這樣。

ccb.text: 灯台上每一对分枝的相连处有花苞，三对分枝都是这样。
